title: நறுமணப் பொருட்களின் கனவு (I Dream of Spices) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: Who is the boy in the poem 'I Dream of Spices'? / 'I Dream of Spices' கவிதையில் வரும் சிறுவன் யார்?
questions.explanation: The poem focuses on a boy named Raj and his trip to the store.

questions.question: What did Raj's mother want him to buy? / ராஜின் அம்மா அவனை எதை வாங்கச் சொன்னார்?
questions.explanation: She sent him Specifically to get spices for cooking.

questions.question: Which of these was NOT in mother's list? / அம்மாவின் பட்டியலில் இல்லாதது எது?
questions.explanation: Mother asked for Cinnamon, Garlic, Ginger, and Pepper; Tomato was not on the list.

questions.question: What is 'Cinnamon' in Tamil? / 'Cinnamon' என்பது தமிழில் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Cinnamon is the dried bark of a tree used as a spice.

questions.question: What did Raj buy instead of Ginger? / இஞ்சிக்கு பதிலாக ராஜ் எதை வாங்கினான்?
questions.explanation: The poem mentions he came back with pickles instead of ginger.

questions.question: Raj went to the shop while ______. / ராஜ் கடைக்குச் செல்லும்போது ______.
questions.explanation: His singing and wandering thoughts led to his confusion.

questions.question: What sounds did Raj make while muttering? / ராஜ் முணுமுணுக்கும்போது என்ன சத்தங்கள் வந்தன?
questions.explanation: The poem uses these onomatopoeic words to describe his funny mutterings.

questions.question: What did Raj's mother do when he returned? / ராஜ் திரும்பியதும் அம்மா என்ன செய்தார்?
questions.explanation: She gave him a 'whack' (playful slap) for forgetting the items.

questions.question: Find the rhyming word for 'Seeds'. / 'Seeds' என்ற சொல்லின் எதுகைச் சொல் எது?
questions.explanation: All these words share the '-eeds' ending sound.

questions.question: What is 'Garlic' in Tamil? / 'Garlic' என்பது தமிழில் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Garlic is the strong-smelling bulb used in cooking.

questions.question: Where did Raj's mother send him? / ராஜ் எங்கு அனுப்பப்பட்டான்?
questions.explanation: He was sent on an errand to the nearby grocery store.

questions.question: The word 'Mutter' means to speak ______. / 'Mutter' என்றால் ______ பேசுவது.
questions.explanation: Muttering is speaking in a low, often indistinct way.

questions.question: Which of these did Raj buy? / ராஜ் எதனை வாங்கினான்?
questions.explanation: He bought sesame seeds instead of cinnamon.

questions.question: Raj forgot the spices because he was ______. / ராஜ் நறுமணப் பொருட்களை மறந்ததற்குக் காரணம் ______.
questions.explanation: His focus was on his internal singing and thoughts.

questions.question: The rhyme for 'Pepper' is ______. / 'Pepper' என்பதன் எதுகைச் சொல் ______.
questions.explanation: Pepper and Mutter rhyme in the specific context of the poem's lines.

questions.question: What is 'Ginger' in Tamil? / 'Ginger' என்பது தமிழில் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Ginger is the pungent root used as a spice (inchi).

questions.question: What are 'Sesame seeds' in Tamil? / 'Sesame seeds' என்பது தமிழில் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Sesame seeds are ellu in Tamil.

questions.question: What did Raj buy along with Onions and Tomatoes? / வெங்காயம் மற்றும் தக்காளியுடன் ராஜ் எதை வாங்கினான்?
questions.explanation: He bought sesame seeds, onions, tomatoes, and pickles.

questions.question: Raj's back was ______ by his mother.
questions.explanation: She gave him a 'whack' on the back.

questions.question: The poem title is 'I Dream of ______'.
questions.explanation: The title relates to the mother's request for spices.

questions.question: How many items did mother ask for? / அம்மா எத்தனைப் பொருட்களைக் கேட்டார்?
questions.explanation: Cinnamon, Garlic, Ginger, Pepper (Total 4).

questions.question: Raj muttered the list while ______ to the shop.
questions.explanation: He was on foot when the encounter happened.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Pickle'?
questions.explanation: Pickles are food items preserved in vinegar or brine.

questions.question: Was Raj a responsible boy in this poem? / ராஜ் ஒரு பொறுப்பான சிறுவனா?
questions.explanation: He failed his task because of his Lack of focus.

questions.question: Which item is a spice? / இவற்றில் எது நறுமணப் பொருள்?
questions.explanation: Only pepper is considered a spice here.

questions.question: Rhyme for 'Back' in the poem is ______. / கவிதையில் 'Back' என்பதன் எதுகைச் சொல் ______.
questions.explanation: The poem ends with mother giving him a whack on his back.

questions.question: The poem describes a ______ incident.
questions.explanation: The situation of getting the wrong items and the reaction is humorous.

questions.question: Mother sent Raj to get spices for ______. / அம்மா எதற்காக நறுமணப் பொருட்களை வாங்கி வரச் சொன்னார்?
questions.explanation: Spices are essentially for preparing food.

questions.question: Raj's mother was ______ with him.
questions.explanation: She was annoyed at his failure to remember the list.

questions.question: What did Raj repeat while walking? / நடந்து செல்லும்போது ராஜ் எதைத் திரும்பத் திரும்பச் சொன்னான்?
questions.explanation: He kept muttering the list so he wouldn't forget, but he did anyway.
